text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur has become a sensational success after
winning the autumn Tenno Sho, Japan Cup, and
Arima Kinen. However, this also means...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's it for my Twinkle Series goals. Time to
recalculate my numbers to figure out what I
should do now.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: In other words, I'll be disappearin' for a while.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Parcae could use an update. This project
demands complete focus, and the academy isn't
the place for that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm not asking you to cover for me while I'm gone.
It's just... I promised to keep you in the loop at
the very minimum, and I don't like breakin' my
word.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who's "everyone"?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I've said my piece. Later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are things only she can do,
incomprehensible to anyone else. She goes
completely off the radar after that, but I trust her
to come back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I demand you take me to Shakur, villain!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I know you've hidden her away somewhere, but I
need to hear her manner of speech once more to
complete my newest opera! Now, hurry me to her
side this instant!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Oh, Shakur! Please come hooome!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: She must've gotten tired of me! I know I have a lot... or rather, I know I'm nothing but flaws, but I promise to fix them all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I can't seem to organize my thoughts properly
without Air Shakur. Cafe refuses to engage with
me earnestly.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I can't make sense of your high-level talk.
Besides... it's perfect for splitting conversation
time with Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Is Air Shakur all right? I haven't seen her around
lately, so I've been worried! I do hope she's
okay...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: UUUWAAAAAASGH! SHAAAAKUUUUUR!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems everyone's first instinct upon realizing
they can't get in touch with Air Shakur is to come
running to me.
choice_data_list:
(I wonder how she'd react if she saw all of them
like this.)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh nooo, what should we do? What if she never
comes back?
Don't worry. She'll be back soon.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um, what do you mean by soon?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There's one place I know she can't keep away
from for long, which means she will certainly turn
up soon!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But she certainly is inconsiderate to make
everyone worry so... She really doesn't
understand anything, does she?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I think we ought to teach her a lesson.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Gather round, everyone. I have an idea...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I can feel my thinking getting sharper, clearer.
It's so comforting to submerge myself in the world
of binary numbers, where everythin' becomes
instantly clear and consistent.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(But... what is this itching, needling feeling inside
me? My mind is beyond sated, but my body is
starved for somethin'. I wanna keep workin',
but...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...I wanna run so damn bad.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: We've been waiting for you, Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What are you doing here? And why'd you bring
Fine?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The hell? Why am I back at the academy? I don't
remember comin' back...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You must have lost yourself entirely in your
thoughts. I knew you couldn't resist running for
long.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
After all, the thing that drives you is your fixation
on winning.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is ready and waiting to race you again.
Doto, Opera O, Top Road, Digital...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And me, of course! But I'll only run with you again
on one condition.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And what's that?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: You must think about what you've done.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You made us all terribly worried about you. You
need to think about that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What I choose to do has nothin' to do with any of
you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, but it does. And you're responsible for making us feel this way. We're all friends now, after all.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What? Listen, I never asked you to b—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter whether you asked for it or not.
You bear responsibility for your very existence,
and you must understand that you live on in the
hearts of others.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Someone who runs as incredibly as you cannot
simply disappear into the ether.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You must understand the weight and importance
of your own being. That is my condition for you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Well?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I didn't know you thought so highly of me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who made me hold you in such
high regard.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Now, what do you have to say for yourself?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry for going AWOL.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That'll do.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to head over to the track first. Come
join us once you're ready!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh! And let's go for some ramen like we
promised, okay? The limited-time flavors will be
gone soon!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... dammit. There goes my plans... Guess I'm
doing the rest of my calculations at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I still don't get what Fine means by understandin'
the weight of my own being, though...
choice_data_list: Seems like she's got you on a short leash.
Seems like she's got you on a short leash.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: 'Scuse you. I'm not a pet, you know.
choice_data_list: No... But what happens next time?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Next time, you can tell anyone who looks like
they wanna give me a headache that I do
whatever I want.
